de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation

Class DefaultTacletTranslator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.DefaultTacletTranslator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SkeletonGenerator

    public class DefaultTacletTranslator
extends java.lang.Object
    Translates a rewrite taclet to a formula.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.SkeletonGenerator

        DEFAULT_TACLET_TRANSLATOR

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected Term getFindFromTaclet(FindTaclet findTaclet)
      Retrieve the "find" Term from a FindTaclet.
      protected Term translate(Sequent s, TermServices services)
      Translates a sequent to a term by using the following translations rules: T ==> D is translated to: And(T)->Or(D).
      And(s): conjunction between all formulae in set s.
      Term translate(Taclet taclet, TermServices services)
      Translates a RewriteTaclet to a formula.

    • Method Detail

      • translate

        public Term translate(Taclet taclet,
                      TermServices services)
               throws IllegalTacletException
        Translates a RewriteTaclet to a formula.
        Parameters:
        taclet - taclet to be translated.
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        returns the translation of the taclet.
        Throws:
        IllegalTacletException

      • getFindFromTaclet

        protected Term getFindFromTaclet(FindTaclet findTaclet)
        Retrieve the "find" Term from a FindTaclet. Originally, this simply calls FindTaclet.find(). Overriding classes may choose to garnish the result with additional information.
        Parameters:
        findTaclet - a non-null taclet instance
        Returns:
        the find clause of the argument

      • translate

        protected Term translate(Sequent s,
                         TermServices services)
        Translates a sequent to a term by using the following translations rules: T ==> D is translated to: And(T)->Or(D).
        And(s): conjunction between all formulae in set s. Or(s): disjunction between all formulae in set s.
        Parameters:
        s - The sequent to be translated.
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        the resulting term of the translation or null if both antecedent and succendent are empty.
